rules.reasonFavorable: Regular shape instead of irregular shape
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Irregular shape instead of regular shape
rules.description: AI_LOT_SHAPE populated and PARCEL_ACREAGE < 1.5; rectangular +1, irregular -0.5, else 0

rules.reasonFavorable: No land constraints instead of slope or trees
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Slope or trees instead of no land constraints
rules.description: Populated only; slope -1, trees -0.5, none +1, other values 0

rules.reasonFavorable: High AI feasibility instead of low AI feasibility
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Low AI feasibility instead of high AI feasibility
rules.description: Both fields populated and confidence >= 70; STRONG_CANDIDATE +1.5, LOW_CANDIDATE -1.5, POSSIBLE_CANDIDATE 0

rules.reasonLabel: share of parcel land covered by buildings
rules.reasonFavorable: Less land covered by buildings instead of more land covered
rules.reasonUnfavorable: More land covered by buildings instead of less land covered
rules.description: Quartile when BS_BUILDING_CNT > 0; overrides: <5% +2, 1.5-2.5 ac & <20% & centroid outside +3, >2.5 ac & <20% & centroid outside +4

rules.reasonFavorable: Smaller building footprint instead of larger building footprint
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Larger building footprint instead of smaller building footprint
rules.description: Quartile when BS_BUILDING_CNT > 0; else 0

rules.reasonFavorable: Parcel centroid outside building instead of inside building footprint
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Parcel centroid inside building instead of outside building footprint
rules.description: FALSE +1 when BS_BUILDING_CNT > 0; TRUE ineligible (0)

rules.reasonLabel: parcel centroid distance to building centroid
rules.reasonFavorable: Parcel centroid farther from building center instead of closer
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Parcel centroid closer to building center instead of farther
rules.description: Quartile when BS_BUILDING_CNT > 0; override > 200 ft → +1

rules.reasonLabel: parcel centroid distance to building edge
rules.reasonFavorable: Parcel centroid farther from building edge instead of closer
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Parcel centroid closer to building edge instead of farther
rules.description: Quartile when BS_BUILDING_CNT > 0; override > 175 ft → +1

rules.reasonFavorable: Corner lot with open building placement instead of interior lot
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Interior lot instead of corner lot
rules.description: Either corner field populated; override +4 when corner, centroid outside building, acreage >= 1; override +3 when corner, centroid outside, acreage < 1; both TRUE +3, one TRUE +1, both FALSE -0.5

rules.reasonFavorable: Closer to road instead of farther from road
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Farther from road instead of closer to road
rules.description: Land only; quartile <=Q1 +1, >=Q3 -1; override >= 300 ft → -2

rules.reasonFavorable: Enough setback for flag lot lane
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Not enough setback to create flag lot lane
rules.description: Quartile on standard lots; override < 30 → -2, > 70 → +2

rules.reasonFavorable: Front and back roads instead of single frontage
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Single frontage instead of front and back roads
rules.description: TRUE +2, FALSE 0

rules.reasonFavorable: More front/back depth instead of less
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Less front/back depth instead of more
rules.description: Standard lot; override < 50 → -2, > 120 → +2 if MAX(FT1, FT2) > 60 else +1

rules.reasonFavorable: Enough depth to split instead of too shallow to split
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Too shallow to split instead of enough depth to split
rules.description: Front/back TRUE: max(FT3,FT4) >100 +2, 70-100 +1, <70 0; override any FT >250 +2, >400 +3

rules.reasonFavorable: Subdivision-friendly zoning instead of restrictive zoning
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Restrictive zoning instead of subdivision-friendly zoning
rules.description: Building on standard lot; Condo/Townhouse +0.5, Low Density Residential <=1 ac -1

rules.reasonFavorable: Older home instead of newer home
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Newer home instead of older home
rules.description: Quartile on BUILT_YEAR >= 1975 only; override BUILT_YEAR < 1975 → +2

rules.reasonFavorable: Smaller home instead of larger home
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Larger home instead of smaller home
rules.description: Quartile; smaller homes score higher

rules.reasonLabel: land value share of total value
rules.reasonFavorable: Higher land share instead of lower land share
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Lower land share instead of higher land share
rules.description: Quartile; higher land-share scores higher

rules.reasonLabel: high-value large home unlikely to subdivide
rules.reasonFavorable: Below large-home threshold instead of above
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Above large-home threshold instead of below
rules.description: Existing structure only; any large-home pattern → -2

rules.reasonFavorable: Lower value instead of higher value
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Higher value instead of lower value
rules.description: Quartile when BS_BUILDING_CNT > 0 and value > 0; lower value scores higher

rules.reasonFavorable: Larger lot instead of smaller lot
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Smaller lot instead of larger lot
rules.description: Quartile; larger acreage scores higher; override > 3 ac → +2

rules.reasonFavorable: Not primary residence instead of owner-occupied
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Primary residence instead of non-owner-occupied
rules.description: FALSE +1, TRUE -0.5

rules.reasonFavorable: Raw land instead of existing structure
rules.reasonUnfavorable: Existing structure instead of raw land
rules.description: Strict raw land +2, existing structure -1

rules.reasonLabel: additional buildable lots under current zoning min lot size
rules.reasonFavorable: More additional buildable lots instead of fewer
rules.reasonUnfavorable: No additional buildable lots or only one lot with parcel centroid inside building
rules.description: lots_that_fit = floor(parcel_sqft / min_lot_sqft); additional = lots_that_fit - (1 if building exists else 0); additional < 1 → -10; 1 lot + centroid in building → -10; 1 lot outside → +1; 2-4 → +2; 5+ → +3

rules.reasonFavorable: Confirmed road access instead of no road access
rules.reasonUnfavorable: No road access instead of confirmed road access
rules.description: Land only (BS_BUILDING_CNT=0 or missing sqft/year); both sources +3, one +1, neither -2
